invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.088（基于ATR 0.0011和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.088 (based on ATR 0.0011 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破65000（基于ATR 770.8559和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.03%（显示多头拥挤），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 65000 (based on ATR 770.8559 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.03% (indicating long crowding).
